summary.romanian_executive: Proiect Django/Wagtail unificat in folderul website-wag, lansat local cu python manage.py runserver. API-ul principal exista in app-ul core (sectoare, regiuni, proiecte, membri, donatii, pagini statice), iar apps members/projects/donations sunt in mare parte schelet. Hardening-ul de productie si testarea automata extinsa lipsesc.
summary.italian_short: Progetto Django/Wagtail unificato, avviato da website-wag con manage.py runserver. Modelli core, admin e API sono presenti; restano da completare hardening e test.
summary.english_short: Unified Django/Wagtail proof-of-concept launched from website-wag via manage.py runserver. Core models, admin and API are active; production hardening and broader tests are still pending.

next_steps: Finalize public page content consistency in templates/site
Wire join/support/contact forms to backend workflows with validation
Split business logic from core into dedicated apps (members/projects/donations) or document current architecture
Harden production security settings (SSL redirect, secure cookies, HSTS)
